sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_registry (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, var_name VARCHAR(255), var_value TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_registry (var_name, var_value) VALUES ('var1', 'value1'), ('var2', NULL), ('var3', '');
SELECT registry_get((SELECT var_name FROM test_registry WHERE id = 1)) WHERE (SELECT var_value FROM test_registry WHERE var_name IS NULL) IS NULL;
SELECT registry_remove((SELECT var_name FROM test_registry WHERE var_value = 'value1' AND var_name IS NOT NULL)) WHERE registry_get('var1') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT registry_remove(COALESCE((SELECT var_name FROM test_registry WHERE var_value IS NULL), 'nonexistent_variable')) WHERE 'dummy' IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_related (ref_id INT REFERENCES test_registry(id), ref_value DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO test_related (ref_id, ref_value) VALUES (1, 1.0), (2, 2.0), (1, NULL), (3, 3.14);
SELECT registry_get(var_name) FROM test_registry WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_related WHERE ref_value IS NOT NULL AND ref_id IS NOT NULL);
SELECT registry_remove((SELECT var_name FROM test_registry WHERE var_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY var_name LIMIT 1)) WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_related WHERE ref_value IS NOT NULL) > 1;
SELECT IS NULL WHERE registry_remove((SELECT var_name FROM test_registry WHERE var_value = 'value1' AND ref_id IN (SELECT ref_id FROM test_related WHERE ref_value IS NULL))) IS NULL;
